description.en: Creates a newPerformanceMarkobject that isn't added to the browser's performance timeline.

excerpt.es: Creates a newPerformanceMarkobject that isn't added to the browser's performance timeline.
excerpt.en: Creates a newPerformanceMarkobject that isn't added to the browser's performance timeline.

description.en: Always returns0(the concept of duration does not apply to layout shifts).

excerpt.es: Always returns0(the concept of duration does not apply to layout shifts).
excerpt.en: Always returns0(the concept of duration does not apply to layout shifts).

description.en: Returns aDOMHighResTimeStamprepresenting the time fromstartTimeto the next rendering paint (rounded to the nearest 8ms).

excerpt.es: Returns aDOMHighResTimeStamprepresenting the time fromstartTimeto the next rendering paint (rounded to the nearest 8ms).
excerpt.en: Returns aDOMHighResTimeStamprepresenting the time fromstartTimeto the next rendering paint (rounded to the nearest 8ms).

description.en: Returns aDOMHighResTimeStamprepresenting the elapsed time between the start and end of the task, with a 1ms granularity.

excerpt.es: Returns aDOMHighResTimeStamprepresenting the elapsed time between the start and end of the task, with a 1ms granularity.
excerpt.en: Returns aDOMHighResTimeStamprepresenting the elapsed time between the start and end of the task, with a 1ms granularity.

description.en: Returns atimestampthat is the difference between thePerformanceNavigationTiming.loadEventEndandPerformanceEntry.startTimeproperties.

excerpt.en: Returns atimestampthat is the difference between thePerformanceNavigationTiming.loadEventEndandPerformanceEntry.startTimeproperties.

description.en: Returns aDOMHighResTimeStamprepresenting the elapsed time in milliseconds between the start and end of the script's execution.

excerpt.en: Returns aDOMHighResTimeStamprepresenting the elapsed time in milliseconds between the start and end of the script's execution.

description.en: Always returns0, asdurationis not applicable for this interface.

excerpt.es: Always returns0, asdurationis not applicable for this interface.
excerpt.en: Always returns0, asdurationis not applicable for this interface.

description.en: Returns"event"(for long events) or"first-input"(for the first user interaction).

excerpt.es: Returns"event"(for long events) or"first-input"(for the first user interaction).
excerpt.en: Returns"event"(for long events) or"first-input"(for the first user interaction).

description.en: Returns the entry type, which is always"script".

excerpt.es: Returns the entry type, which is always"script".
excerpt.en: Returns the entry type, which is always"script".

description.en: Returns one of the following strings referring to the browsing context or frame that can be attributed to the long task:"cross-origin-ancestor""cross-origin-descendant""cross-origin-unreachable""multiple-contexts""same-origin-ancestor""same-origin-descendant""same-origin""self""unknown"

excerpt.es: Returns one of the following strings referring to the browsing context or frame that can be attributed to the long task:"cross-origin-ancestor""cross-origin-descendant""cross-origin-unreachable""multi...
excerpt.en: Returns one of the following strings referring to the browsing context or frame that can be attributed to the long task:"cross-origin-ancestor""cross-origin-descendant""cross-origin-unreachable""multi...

description.en: Returns thedocument's URL. Note thattext fragments, and any other fragment directives, are stripped from the URL.

excerpt.en: Returns thedocument's URL. Note thattext fragments, and any other fragment directives, are stripped from the URL.

description.en: Returns the entry name, which is always"script".

excerpt.en: Returns the entry name, which is always"script".

description.en: Returns aDOMHighResTimeStamprepresenting the time when the layout shift started.

description.en: Returns aDOMHighResTimeStamprepresenting the associated event'stimestampproperty. This is the time the event was created and can be considered as a proxy for the time the user interaction occurred.
